title: Australian Sirloin Steak Wrap
description: A delicious and easy-to-make wrap filled with grilled sirloin steak, served with a side of tangy sauce. Perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.

ingredients.name: Mayonnaise
ingredients.notes: or any other sauce of choice

instructions: 2. Season the sirloin steak with salt and pepper on both sides.
3. Grill the steak for 5-7 minutes per side for medium-rare, or until it reaches your desired level of doneness.
4. Remove the steak from the grill and let it rest for a few minutes before slicing.
5. Meanwhile, toast the wrap on the grill or in a toaster.
6. Spread a layer of mayonnaise on the wrap.
7. Add sliced steak, lettuce, tomato, and red onion on top of the mayonnaise.
